steps: "File IB 92 Universeel form with Dutch Belastingdienst to claim refund of excess dividend tax on Unilever NV shares under NL-NO treaty",
"Submit evidence of Norwegian tax residency and beneficial ownership of 520,000 UNA shares to support 15% treaty rate claim",
"Request ABN AMRO Custody to provide detailed tax calculation breakdown showing 25% withholding vs. treaty-entitled 15% rate",
"Monitor refund processing timeline (typically 8-16 weeks) and follow up with Belastingdienst if no response received"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
